entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The specific crop being studied for testing site stratification in the SADC region

entities.name: SADC REGION
entities.description: The Southern African Development Community region where the study is focused

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output that needs to be maximized through accurate cultivar selection

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Specific varieties of crops targeted for appropriate production areas

entities.name: TESTING SITES
entities.description: Locations used to evaluate cultivars, critical for breeding efficiency

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved crop varieties, affected by the number and location of testing sites

entities.name: PRODUCTION AREAS
entities.description: Target regions where crops are grown, which testing sites must represent

entities.name: PRODUCTION ZONES
entities.description: Intra-regional areas identified based on similarities in cultivar response to production conditions

entities.name: YIELD DATA
entities.description: Long-term data from regional trials used to identify production zones

entities.name: REGIONAL TRIALS
entities.description: Trials conducted across the SADC region to gather yield data

entities.name: PRODUCTION CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors that influence the response of cultivars
